commands.review_summary:
The branch filters ClawSweeper self-noise and exact review-command comments from collected issue/PR context, extracts compact previous-review state, adds filtered-count telemetry, and covers the behavior in unit tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the changed path: collectItemContext now filters hydrated issue comments and PR review comments before prompt compaction and related-item discovery. I did not run a live ingestion because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed right now: the earlier concrete code blockers appear fixed, and the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied live ingestion proof plus normal maintainer review.

target.title: Filter noisy PR ingestion comments
target.body:
## Summary
- filter ClawSweeper self-noise and exact command-only comments out of review context
- extract the latest ClawSweeper durable review as compact previous-review state
- pass filtered comments into related-item discovery and expose filtered counts in context telemetry

## Validation
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts
target.author: takhoffman
